local-ai-future.title: Everyone argues about whether the datacenter buildout pays off.

psych-maslow.title: People do not want productivity tools.

ctc-arc.title: Japan made transistor radios that broke. Then they made cars that didn't.

ctc-india.title: India may have already completed the quality cycle in two sectors.

psych-contagion.title: Emotions spread without words. Without intention. Just proximity.

psych-shadow.title: Every company has two versions of itself.

ai-electricity-bottleneck.title: NVIDIA doubled its AI revenue forecast. From $500B to $1T.

dark-forest-internet.title: The open web may already be dead.

cognitive-load.title: Your brain was built for scarcity. It now lives in abundance.

god-protocol.title: What happens when a machine knows everything?

synthetic-empathy.title: The machine does not feel. But you will.

twilight-economy.title: Who did the work? Nobody knows anymore.

agi-governance.title: How do you govern something smarter than you?

ambient-intelligence.title: The best interface is no interface.

artificial-intuition.title: Logic finds answers. Intuition finds questions.

lit-meetings.title: Nobody on LinkedIn has meetings. They have cross-functional alignment sessions.

psych-bystander.title: The more people in the room, the less likely anyone acts.

psych-cbt.title: Notion is therapy. Journaling apps are therapy. Habit trackers are therapy.

psych-hero.title: Every pitch deck that works tells a story.

psych-dunning-kruger.title: I formed strong opinions about AI after a few weeks with it.

agentic-commerce.title: Your next customer is an algorithm.

psych-helplessness.title: After enough times being ignored, people stop raising their hand.

singularity-paradox.title: You cannot predict an intelligence smarter than you.

pseudonymous-agency.title: Participation or privacy. You were told to choose.

internet-of-lies.title: Truth has no built-in advantage on the internet.

asi-timeline.title: When does superintelligence arrive? The honest answer: nobody knows.
